message:
feat(core,dir): implement ext4 directory metadata checksum support

Core (ffs-core):
- Track reserved_tail size (12 bytes) for ext4 directory entries with
  metadata checksum support (dx_tail / ext4_dir_entry_tail)
- Add ext4_dir_reserved_tail() method to detect csum feature flag
- Update init_dir_block, add_entry, remove_entry to pass reserved_tail
  so space calculations exclude the checksum tail region

Directory (ffs-dir):
- Initialize ext4 checksum tail structure in final 12 bytes of
  directory blocks (marker 0xDE, zero-filled checksum fields)
- Update init_dir_block signature to accept reserved_tail parameter

This enables correct directory block space accounting when ext4
metadata_csum feature is active, preventing overwrites of the
trailing checksum structure.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
